uxRule: Every element answers one of: Where am I? What needs attention? What should I do next?

items.check: Org Health Summary visible on main org view when positions > 0
items.evidence: OrgHealthSummary.tsx renders above org chart section when positions.length > 0. Shows narrative text + metric cards.

items.check: Health summary uses only existing computed state — no new backend endpoints
items.evidence: Props sourced from: positionAssignmentById.size, positions.length, openActions, overdueActions, blockedActions, positionComplianceAlerts. All pre-existing useMemo values.

items.check: Narrative text communicates org status in plain language (not just numbers)
items.evidence: healthNarrative() produces: 'Organization is 82% staffed.', '4 positions are vacant.', '3 actions require attention.', '2 compliance items unresolved.' Sentence-level language, not metric labels.

items.check: Coverage progress bar visible at a glance
items.evidence: 80px progress bar with color-coded fill (green=100%, blue=≥80%, amber=<80%) + percentage label in OrgHealthSummary header.

items.check: Founder can understand current org status in <5 seconds without inspecting individual positions
items.evidence: Narrative first, compact metric chips second. All relevant signals (staffing, vacancies, actions, compliance) visible in one panel without position selection.

items.check: Needs attention badge is clickable and opens filtered view
items.evidence: AppShell HealthBadge has onClick prop. 'needs attention' badge onClick={() => setDrillDownMode('actions')} when needsAttention > 0.

items.check: Vacant count badge is clickable and opens filtered view
items.evidence: 'vacant' badge onClick={() => setDrillDownMode('vacancies')} when vacantCount > 0.

items.check: Actions badge is clickable and opens filtered view
items.evidence: 'open actions' badge onClick={() => setDrillDownMode('actions')} when openActions > 0.

items.check: Vacancy drill-down shows position title, reporting manager, team, and vacancy age
items.evidence: DrillDownPanel vacancies mode shows: position title, teamName, reportsToTitle, formatVacancyAge(since) derived from position.updatedAt.

items.check: Actions drill-down distinguishes overdue vs blocked with visual priority
items.evidence: DrillDownPanel actions mode: overdue items get red background+badge, blocked items get amber. Sorted overdue→blocked→other. Shows owner name, position link, due date.

items.check: Compliance drill-down shows specific missing fields per person/position
items.evidence: DrillDownPanel compliance mode: shows position, person name, 'Missing email' / 'Missing phone' tags from positionComplianceAlerts data.

items.check: Every drill-down row is actionable (click navigates to position panel)
items.evidence: Vacancy and compliance rows call onSelectPosition(positionId) + onClose() on click, setting focusPositionId and switching to position panel.

items.check: Evidence completion guidance appears after assignment saved
items.evidence: useEffect fires when positionAssignmentById.size > prevFilledCount: sets setupProgressPositionId + showSetupProgress=true. SetupProgressCard renders in fixed bottom-right.

items.check: Setup progress card shows 3-step visual (Structure ✓, Assignment ✓, Evidence ○)
items.evidence: SetupProgressCard renders 3 step indicators. Structure always done. Assignment done if positionAssignmentById has entry. Evidence done if signed document exists.

items.check: 'Complete Evidence' CTA deep-links to Documents tab on the assigned position
items.evidence: onCompleteEvidence: setActiveNav('org') + setFocusPositionId(setupProgressPositionId) + setPositionPanelTab('documents') + setShowSetupProgress(false). Zero additional clicks.

items.check: Evidence completion percentage shown on setup progress card
items.evidence: compliancePct = Math.round((totalSigned / positions.length) * 100). Rendered as progress bar + percentage label in SetupProgressCard.

items.check: No new backend endpoints introduced
items.evidence: All data sourced from existing useMemo state. No new API calls. No new api-server endpoints. Zero changes to event system.

items.check: No regression to Flow #1 behavior (loading, empty state, shell)
items.evidence: LoadingScreen, EmptyOrgGuide, OrgReadyBanner untouched. AppShell nav + sidebar unchanged. Only badges extended with onClick.

items.check: No regression to Flow #2 behavior (tabs, stub removal, termination consolidation)
items.evidence: Assignment tab, numbered workflow tabs, Vacate position button, OrgReadyBanner deep-link all unchanged in this closure.

items.check: OrgHealthSummary metric cards are clickable where the underlying data is actionable
items.evidence: MetricCard renders as <button> with onClick prop. Vacancy, needs-attention, open-actions, compliance cards have clickable=true with View details → affordance. Filled card is informational only.
